kill_switches.reason: Release owner may pause notebook execution promotion while kernel lineage evidence is refreshed.
kill_switches.preserved_data_scope: Notebook files and recorded outputs remain available for inspection and export.
kill_switches.fallback_path: Reopen notebooks locally and export the last durable execution packet.

rollout_governance.rationale: Notebook execution is beta-only for the current M5 cohort and must keep lifecycle markers on support and docs surfaces.

rollout_governance.display_label: Data request, result, and handoff surfaces

kill_switches.fallback_path: Continue with local query inspection and export the result handoff packet.

rollout_governance.rationale: Data request surfaces stay beta while notebook, chart, and AI handoff evidence remains cohort-bound.

kill_switches.reason: Release owner may pause profiler capture broadening if trace export evidence drifts.

rollout_governance.rationale: Profiler capture is broadly beta but still requires visible beta posture and export lineage.

kill_switches.reason: Trace replay remains in the named preview ring until replay support-class evidence clears.

rollout_governance.rationale: Trace replay remains preview-only and browser/companion consumers must disclose the desktop handoff path instead of widening authority.

kill_switches.reason: The release owner may freeze broadening while docs-browser proof freshness is stale.

rollout_governance.rationale: Docs-browser external handoff is temporarily narrowed to RetestPending because the freshness proof for claimed help/docs behavior has lapsed.

kill_switches.reason: Live preview remains a local Labs opt-in surface and may not publish stable wording.

kill_switches.reason: A local opt-in request exists but cannot widen the current managed rollout boundary.

kill_switches.reason: The managed policy ceiling blocks workspace-state push for the current cohort.

kill_switches.reason: Offboarding broadening may pause while delete proof and export coverage is refreshed.
